name: Dry Manicure
description: Nail shaping, cuticle care, hand massage, and nail polish. Does not include gel polish.

name: Spa Manicure
description: Relaxing spa manicure with soak, exfoliation, hand massage, and nail polish. Does not include gel polish.

name: Spa Pedicure
description: Relaxing foot soak, exfoliation, massage, and nail polish. Does not include gel polish.

name: Gel Polish (Natural Nails)
description: Long-lasting gel polish on natural nails.

name: Gel Polish (Toes)
description: Long-lasting gel polish on toenails.

name: Gel-X — Short (S)
description: Full set of Gel-X nail extensions, short length. Includes gel polish. Base price for a 3-week treatment.

name: Gel-X — Medium (M)
description: Full set of Gel-X nail extensions, medium length. Includes gel polish. Base price for a 3-week treatment.

name: Gel-X — Long (L)
description: Full set of Gel-X nail extensions, long length. Includes gel polish. Base price for a 3-week treatment.

name: Gel-X — XL
description: Full set of Gel-X nail extensions, extra long length. Includes gel polish. Base price for a 3-week treatment.

name: Builder Gel (Natural Nail)
description: Strengthening builder gel applied over natural nails for added length and durability. Includes gel polish.

name: Builder Gel Fill
description: Fill and refresh for existing builder gel. Includes gel polish.

name: Acrylic Toes
description: Acrylic applied to the big toes only for added strength and shape. $7.50 per toe — $15 for both.

name: Foreign Removal
description: Safe removal of nail products applied by another salon.

name: Acrylic Removal
description: Safe and gentle removal of acrylic nails.

name: Nail Fix
description: Repair a broken or damaged nail.

name: Design — French
description: Classic French tip design.

name: Design — Level 1
description: Simple nail art design (e.g. solid accents, basic patterns).

name: Design — Level 2
description: Intermediate nail art design (e.g. florals, gradients, foils).

name: Design — Level 3
description: Detailed nail art design (e.g. intricate patterns, chrome, embellishments).

name: Design — Level 4
description: Premium custom nail art (e.g. 3D art, hand-painted scenes, complex characters).
